hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f || exit 0; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; if echo "$f" | grep -qE 'frontend/src/.*[.](ts|tsx)$'; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/frontend" || exit 0; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20; npx eslint "$f" 2>&1 | tail -10; elif echo "$f" | grep -qE 'backend/src/.*[.](ts|tsx)$'; then [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/backend/package.json" ] || exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/backend" || exit 0; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20; npx eslint "$f" 2>&1 | tail -10; fi; exit 0; }

input=$(cat); cmd=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); case "$cmd" in *'git commit'*) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; failed=0; { cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/frontend" && npx tsc --noEmit >&2 && npx eslint src/ >&2; } || failed=1; if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/backend/package.json" ]; then { cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/backend" && npx tsc --noEmit >&2 && npx eslint src/ >&2; } || failed=1; fi; if [ $failed -ne 0 ]; then echo 'TypeScript 类型检查或 ESLint 失败，请修复后再提交' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
